data.text/html:
Re-fit (optional)

Runs the fit scripts for the selected task / subjects / K range and overwrites _metrics.parquet files in the chosen folders.
Reload the page afterward to see updated metrics.

data.text/markdown: Press the button above to trigger re-fitting.
